brief: Advise how to launch an AI customer-support summarization feature while reducing privacy, retention, and misrepresentation risk.

facts: Summaries create CRM notes from support calls.
Inputs may include names, contract terms, support tickets, and volunteered health/payment details.
Vendor model contract retains prompts for abuse monitoring unless zero-retention is enabled.
Sales wants to advertise automatic renewal-risk detection.
Product logs raw transcripts for 180 days.
Customers are in the US, Canada, and EU.
Agents can edit summaries but edits are not separately audited.
DPA template has not been updated for AI processing disclosures.
conflicting_signals: Feature may improve account management but retention and marketing create risk.
Human editing helps but auditability is incomplete.

grounding_rule: Use only this context pack. Do not invent facts. Label uncertainty when context is incomplete.
